overall.description: First-person perspective walk through a subway train car in a video game (resembling GTA V). The camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed metal interior, passing seated passengers and fluorescent-lit advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway train car interior with passenger seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center aisle of the subway car from the entrance toward the far end

notable_agents.action: woman with short dark hair wearing gray tank top and pink shoes sitting on the left bench
man with beard wearing brown hoodie holding white cup sitting on the left bench

entered.detail: vertical black metal poles for standing passengers to hold
black textured bench seats running along the left wall of the car
black textured bench seats running along the right wall of the car
red and white advertisement poster with METRO text visible
metal door with window at the far end of the train car
black and white maze-like geometric patterns on the walls between windows
rectangular windows showing the dark tunnel exterior
rectangular fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera walks steadily through a narrow enclosed subway car with industrial metal walls and artificial fluorescent lighting. Passengers sit on black benches along the sides, including a woman in a gray tank top near the entrance and a man in a brown hoodie further down. Geometric wall decals and METRO advertisements line the walls between the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression through the sterile, enclosed interior of a moving subway car. It begins by moving past a woman in a gray tank top seated near the entrance, surrounded by industrial metal walls and artificial fluorescent lighting. As the camera advances, the view shifts along the length of the car, passing black benches and geometric wall decals. The scene then opens up to reveal a man in a brown hoodie further down the aisle, while METRO advertisements flicker past on the walls between the windows.
